title: jujutsu kaisen's pvp
description: jjk themed items with the contrasts of blue, red and purple
body:
this texture pack is an all in one for minecraft competitive with new textures for every gamemode in the game.

the colors are blue, red and purple representing gojo's cursed technique

it has custom 3d textures:
### -GAVEL for Density Mace
### -Executioner Sword for Netherite Spear
### -Inverted Spear Of Heaven for breach mace

And it includes animated items and small utilities for better vision in tense moments.
